sex.Description: sex of the participant as reported by the participant

handedness.Description: handedness of the participant as reported by the participant

EartoEar.Description: Measurement from one ear to the other across the top of the head

ArrayWornOrder.Description: The study collected Word-Color Stroop response from each subject while wearing a High-Density (HD) array and separately while wearing a Sparse array. Order of cap worn varied per subject. This documents which array was worn first for testing and then switching to the other array for testing.

CapSize.Description: fNIRS headcaps were available for circumference sizes of 54cm, 56cm, 58cm. This documents which cap was prepared (based on subject's pre-study self-reported head size) and worn by the subject during testing.
